name: Petits Bateaux Dans La Sauce (Little Boats in Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add the lard until you have a coarse mixture.
3. Add milk gradually until the dough is smooth but not too sticky.
4. Roll the dough to be 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut into rectangles measuring 4 inches by 2 inches.
6. Pinch together each end of the rectangle to form a shape resembling small boats.
7. In a casserole dish, combine the sauce ingredients.
8. Place the casserole dish in the oven and set at 350°F until gently boiling.
9. Place the "little boats" into the sauce in the casserole dish.
10. Bake for about 30 minutes.
11. Remove pastries from the casserole dish, then serve with sauce covering them.
